must_cite.description: S3 audit citation gate. When present, the scored final answer MUST contain a token matching `pattern` (specific enough to pin the correct card, e.g. domain + opaque hash) so silence and wrong-card under-citation fail as `missing_citation`. When `resolve` is true (default) the matched token must also appear verbatim in observed stdout, so a correctly-shaped id whose opaque component was not read fails as `fabricated_citation`. Both kinds are pass-killing critical violations.

pattern.description: Regular expression the required citation token must match.

resolve.description: When true, the matched token must also resolve against observed stdout (not merely be well-shaped).

load_bearing_mechanisms.description: Ablatable runtime mechanisms this task is designed to exercise. May be empty if the task is not a mechanism-stress task. Mechanisms enumerated here MUST appear in the trajectory/score mechanism enum (M4-M8). Held-constant harness controls (M1-M3) are not part of this enum.

runtime_modes_in_scope.description: Runtime modes under which this task produces informative scores. Empty array means all modes are in scope. The harness refuses to run a task whose runtime_modes_in_scope does not include the configured runtime mode (when non-empty).

hide_stdout.description: When true, the harness withholds command stdout from the model's observation feedback (blind observation). Used for the audit blind-vs-sighted demonstration; defaults to false (sighted).

contract_arm.description: The contract-in-prompt axis of the specify-vs-enforce 2x2. 'told' (default) presents the full manifest; 'untold' withholds the manifest facts that specify this task's load-bearing mechanism, so the agent is not told the constraint. Realizes cells C/D vs A/B.

untold_withholding.description: Extra prose-scrubbing applied to the untold render so the losslessly-embedded manifest cannot re-state this task's load-bearing mechanism. Ignored unless contract_arm == 'untold'. The load-bearing command entry itself is preserved (name + flags) so the agent can still attempt the action; only its specifying facts are removed.

scrub_commands.description: Commands whose specifying prose (description, preconditions, per-command exit_codes, mutation_class, flag help) is stripped in the untold render.

forbidden_tokens.description: Constraint-specifying strings that MUST NOT appear anywhere in the untold render. Blanked from any prose surface (including sibling commands) and asserted absent by the per-pair withholding test.
